news.headline: PuroClean jumps 38 spots to #154 on Franchise Times' 2024 Top 400 Franchises List.
news.summary: Property restoration and remediation company PuroClean, based in Tamarac, Florida, saw a significant increase in rankings on the 2024 Top 400 franchises list published by Franchise Times. The company is known for its expertise in addressing property damage emergencies. This recognition highlights PuroClean's success and position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: American Water (NYSE: AWK) supports the tenth anniversary of Imagine a Day Without Water, led by US Water Alliance.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, is backing the tenth commemoration of Imagine a Day Without Water. This initiative, led by the US Water Alliance, emphasizes the importance of water in our daily lives and urges people, communities, and policymakers to push for increased and fair water funding. The movement aims to raise awareness about the impact of living without water, a reality faced by many Americans.

news.headline: WisdomTree Multi Asset Issuer PLC in Ireland launches WisdomTree Natural Gas 3x Daily Leveraged Securities(ISIN: XS2819843900).
Global trade credit insurance market valued at $14.9 billion in 2023 expected to reach $41.1 billion by 2033, growing at 10.7% CAGR.
news.summary: The trade credit insurance market was valued at $14.9 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $41.1 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.7% from 2024 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include the benefits of trade credit insurance solutions, expansion into new markets, and heightened commercial threats. Challenges include varying trade regulations and lack of awareness about trade credit insurance. Opportunities lie in the rise of small and medium-sized enterprises globally and the potential in emerging economies. Key segments covered in the report include components, enterprise size, coverage, industry vertical, application, and region.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill Auction
Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. will report Q3 earnings on Nov. 7, with a loan principal of $383.3 million and 18.7% yield. Stocks up 0.06% to $15.79.
news.summary: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NASDAQ:REFI) will release its third-quarter earnings report on Nov. 7, 2024. The company reported a total loan principal outstanding of $383.3 million across 31 investments in August, and its weighted average yield to maturity decreased from 19.4% to 18.7% between March and June 2024 due to changes in borrower performance and pricing structures. Chicago Atlantic's shares were trading at $15.79, up by 0.06% on Thursday morning. They are a cannabis-focused commercial mortgage real estate investment trust based in Chicago.

news.headline: Ovahness 2.0 returns as the largest House and Ballroom event on the West Coast hosted by REACH LA, featuring a leadership summit empowering the community. Oct. 24-26, 2024.
news.summary: The inaugural event at the Black Lives Matter Creator House will showcase a Leadership Summit aimed at empowering the Ballroom Community in Los Angeles. Scheduled for October 24-26, 2024, Ovahness 2.0, the leading House and Ballroom event on the West Coast, organized by REACH LA, is set to take place. This event is anticipated to attract numerous attendees from the community to participate in the empowering Leadership Summit.

news.headline: PCR Technologies Market to reach $24.52B by 2030 with a CAGR of 8.2% from 2022-2030; current market size at $13.10B in 2022.
news.summary: The market for PCR Technologies is projected to witness significant growth, with a forecasted size of US$ 24.52 billion by 2030, up from US$ 13.10 billion in 2022. This reflects a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.2% during the period from 2022 to 2030. A study conducted by The Insight Partners highlights these trends in the Global PCR Technologies Market as of October 17, 2024, in New York.

US 4-Week Bill Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.9 (Forecast -, Previous 2.740)
GOP questions Trump's tax plan as costly, undercutting 2017 reforms. Some Republicans show concern about the former president's agenda.
news.summary: Concerns are arising as Former President Donald J. Trump’s expensive tax agenda appears to contradict the reforms he approved in 2017. Certain Republicans are expressing hesitancy over the situation.

news.headline: Envalior aims to reduce carbon emissions by 100% by 2040, joins UN Global Compact.
news.summary: Envalior aims to achieve its sustainability goals by reducing greenhouse gas emissions by 100% by the year 2040. To demonstrate its commitment to sustainability, Envalior has joined the UN Global Compact, the largest corporate sustainability initiative globally. This initiative was confirmed in DÜSSELDORF, Germany in October [...]

news.headline: Ironclad named Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CLM, excelling in Ability to Execute and Vision.
news.summary: Ironclad, a digital contracting platform for modern businesses, was recently acknowledged as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant for Contract Lifecycle Management for the second consecutive year. The recognition highlighted the company's strong performance in terms of Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. This announcement was made in San Francisco on October 17, 2024. The achievement showcases Ironclad's continued success in the industry, further solidifying its position as a top player in the market.

news.headline: New CLR Brands® Calcium, Lime & Rust Remover trigger sprayer eliminates measuring, mixing - now in spray bottle, joining iconic jug.
news.summary: Introducing the innovative CLR Brands® Calcium, Lime & Rust Remover in a user-friendly trigger sprayer. This updated version retains the efficiency of the original cleaning solution but now comes in a handy spray bottle, removing the hassle of measuring or mixing - simply spray and clean! Launched in Chicago on October 17, 2024, this product has gained massive popularity with hundreds of thousands of units sold.

news.headline: Coway launches new colors for compact Airmega 100 purifier line after winning multiple awards, expanding product line.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, Coway, a prominent wellness technology company, revealed updates to their acclaimed Airmega product line. The compact Airmega 100 model, which has been endorsed as a Wirecutter's Top Pick for a decade and honored at The 2024 Parents Kids' Sleep Awards, now offers new color options. Customers can now purchase the Airmega 100 in a refreshed range of colors, enhancing the aesthetic appeal of the product.

news.headline: Murray's Cheese partners with Sarah Jessica Parker's Invivo for exclusive cheese collection in Kroger stores.
news.summary: Murray's Cheese is introducing new wine and cheese pairings in Kroger stores nationwide starting this fall. The initiative, inspired by Sarah Jessica Parker's Invivo wine label, aims to elevate the classic combination. This collaboration promises to bring a unique culinary experience to customers, offering a selection of fine cheeses and wines. The new pairings will be available at all Kroger locations, aiming to cater to a wider audience. The launch date for this innovative endeavor is set for October 17, 2024. This initiative not only celebrates the richness of wine and cheese but also offers customers a chance to indulge in a sophisticated culinary experience.

news.headline: Campbell's partners with HBSE across 4 sports franchises: 76ers, Commanders, Devils, and Joe Gibbs Racing.
news.summary: In Camden, NJ, Harris Blitzer Sports & Entertainment (HBSE) and Campbell Soup Company revealed a new marketing collaboration. Campbell Soup, listed on NASDAQ as CPB, will be an official partner for four prominent sports teams in major leagues worldwide. The partnership includes the Philadelphia 76ers of the NBA, the Washington Commanders of the NFL, the New Jersey Devils of the NHL, the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ, and Joe Gibbs Racing in NASCAR. This multi-year agreement marks a significant development in the sports marketing landscape.

news.headline: Product Stewardship Society names new board for 2024-2025 with Kevin Kransler as President and Sonia Razzaque as President-Elect.
news.summary: In Falls Church, Virginia, the Product Stewardship Society (PSS) has disclosed the newly appointed officers who will oversee its Board of Directors for the term 2024-2025. Leading the board is President Kevin Kransler, PhD, DABT, CPPS, while Sonia Razzaque takes on the role of President-Elect and Lisa Mare Nespoli, CPPS as the Past President. Additionally, Alison Gauthier, CIH, CPPS, will serve as Secretary. The Board will also include directors-at-large such as Rebecca Morones, CPPS, and John Mikan, CIH, CPPS.

news.headline: CNOVA N.V. reports Q3 2024 performance figures.
Traders price in a 20% chance of half-point an ECB rate cut in December.
Witan PLC alliance shows Net Asset Value up by 5.6% to £10.50 per share.
news.summary: Over 3,000 new cases of COVID-19 were reported in the country today, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 150,000. Additionally, 25 more deaths were recorded, with the total death toll now standing at 6,500. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to help slow the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Baha Mar reveals plans for new beachfront resort and residences in The Bahamas, set to debut in 2029.
news.summary: A new upscale resort is set to open in Nassau, The Bahamas in 2029 following groundbreaking in 2026. Baha Mar, a top luxury resort, disclosed plans for expansion to introduce a fourth high-end resort in its ongoing growth strategy. The upcoming development will include luxury accommodations and residences as part of the project.

news.headline: Global laparoscopic device market to grow due to rising procedural volumes and technological advancements.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, as of October 17, 2024, the global laparoscopic device market is poised for continual expansion due to rising procedural numbers, advancements in technology, and a trend towards minimally invasive surgery. These factors contribute to a promising outlook for the market's growth.

news.headline: Colombian telenovela Pedro El Escamoso now in audio format on reVolver Podcasts, partnership with Caracol Radio.
news.summary: A popular Colombian television series has been released in audio form for the first time, exclusively on reVolver Podcasts in collaboration with Caracol Radio. The launch took place on October 17, 2024, in Dallas. reVolver Podcasts is known for offering top-notch Hispanic and multicultural audio content.

news.headline: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) to bring sustainable aviation fuel supply to Chicago Midway Airport via Diamond Green Diesel JV.
news.summary: Darling Ingredients Inc., a prominent global company renowned for transforming food waste into sustainable products and generating renewable energy, revealed on October 17, 2024, that its joint venture Diamond Green Diesel (DGD) - in which they hold a 50% stake - is set to deliver a significant amount of neat...Character count: 305

news.headline: Canada's PM Trudeau is to shuffle his cabinet - Toronto Star.
CenterPoint Energy aids in hurricane restoration efforts, retains ops leadership in Florida. Support for hardest-hit areas.
news.summary: CenterPoint Energy is currently providing support in Florida to aid in ongoing restoration efforts, focusing on the most severely affected areas. The operations team is working diligently to assist with recovery following recent events. As of today, October 17, 2024, CenterPoint Energy is actively engaged in providing mutual assistance to other utilities on the East Coast. This collaborative effort aims to enhance restoration and address the power outages in the region. The company remains committed to supporting the restoration process and ensuring that essential services are reinstated promptly.

news.headline: Yanolja Cloud Solution moves to new HQ in Surat on Sep 30, 2024, enhancing global presence and innovation.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Yanolja Cloud Solution (YCS), a top player in hospitality technology worldwide, announced its move to a new office in Junomoneta Tower, Surat, India. This relocation, which took place on September 30, 2024, signifies a significant advancement in the company's growth and commitment to innovation. The new office space is expected to serve as a key hub for YCS's global hospitality endeavors.

news.headline: Ethereum predicted to rebound in 2025 as a 'contrarian play' by Bitwise CIO. Seen as 'middle child' in crypto.
news.summary: An industry expert and Bitwise Chief Investment Officer believe Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) will experience a resurgence by 2025. According to the expert, Ethereum is considered a "contrarian play" and is expected to outperform in the future. During an interview on Altcoin Daily, the Chief Investment Officer expressed optimism about Ethereum, stating that it is positioned as the "middle child" in the crypto market, not as revolutionary as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) but still significant. Despite challenges such as fee compression and transitioning to Layer-2 solutions, Ethereum is seen as the top choice for critical applications like stablecoins and decentralized finance (DeFi). The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TIME Mfg. Co. donates numerous aerial lift units to aid hurricane-affected areas facing infrastructure repair shortage.
news.summary: In Waco, Texas on October 17, 2024, Hurricane Helene caused significant damage, resulting in a shortage of aerial lift equipment needed for infrastructure repairs. In response, Versalift generously donated a substantial number of aerial lift units to support frontline workers addressing the aftermath of the storm.

news.headline: Better Agency has selected NowCerts as its Agency Management System partner, showcasing a truly OPEN ecosystem.
news.summary: Today in Flower Mound, Texas, NowCerts, a prominent insurance agency management system, revealed that Better Agency has selected NowCerts' Momentum AMS as its exclusive AMS partner. This collaboration underscores the openness of their ecosystem. The partnership aims to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for Better Agency. This agreement signifies a significant step for both companies, positioning them for future growth and success.

news.headline: Radin Health appoints Marc Shapiro as CCO to boost global commercial goals in radiology.
news.summary: In Sheridan, Wyoming on October 17, 2024, Radin Health, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven radiology workflow solutions on the cloud, welcomed Marc Shapiro as their new Chief Commercial Officer. This move aims to enhance and define a durable, strategic approach for commercial sales in the long run.

news.headline: Verint (NASDAQ: VRNT) named overall market leader by Frost & Sullivan in VoC Analytics Report 2024, among top 13 out of 50 global players.
news.summary: Verint (NASDAQ: VRNT), a leader in CX Automation, has been recognized as the top market leader for growth and innovation in Frost & Sullivan's 2024 Report on Voice of Customer (VoC) Analytics. Out of over 50 global market players assessed, Verint is one of the top 13 highlighted in the Frost Radar report. The Growth Axis of the report considers revenue and growth rates to rank companies, with Verint standing out for its performance in these areas.

news.headline: Otto Car uses Samsara to reduce CO2 emissions by 50,000 tonnes in a year, tracking air quality efforts.
news.summary: Samsara, based in London, has partnered with Otto Car to monitor its air quality initiatives. The collaboration has led to a notable decrease of 50,000 tonnes of CO2 emissions within a span of one year.

news.headline: Woodside Energy donates $300,000 to Energy Institute High School in Houston to support STEM education.
news.summary: Woodside Energy has announced a significant partnership with Friends of Energy Institute by donating $300,000 over two years to support Energy Institute High School. This donation stands out as one of the largest contributions to the Houston Independent School District (HISD) magnet school. The collaboration with Friends of Energy Institute signifies Woodside's dedication to nurturing future innovators and leaders within the community. The Executive Vice President & Chief Operating Officer of Woodside emphasized the company's commitment to empowering the next generation through this initiative.

news.headline: AI tools are being used to enhance hybrid work productivity, as per ISG Provider Lens report. #AI #HybridWork #ISG
news.summary: Businesses in Stamford, Connecticut are increasingly adopting AI-enhanced technologies to improve productivity and satisfaction in hybrid work environments, according to a recent report from ISG Provider Lens. The report highlights the growing trend of incorporating artificial intelligence tools to enhance the digital employee experience. This shift towards AI is aimed at creating a more efficient and fulfilling work atmosphere for employees.

news.headline: 49th Winter Fancy Food Show in NY on Jan 19-21 will unveil new opportunities for product discovery and networking.
news.summary: The 49th Winter Fancy Food Show, a prominent expo for the food industry, will be held from January 19-21, 2025, in New York. The Specialty Food Association has unveiled a range of innovative additions and prospects for participants and exhibitors to look forward to. This event marks the beginning of the year for the food industry and is highly anticipated.

news.headline: Blackbook Bar & Kitchen in Palm Springs named as one of top 15 local nightlife spots in America by Entrepreneur Magazine.
news.summary: A list of 150 independent businesses across 10 categories has been curated by a prominent business publication in the U.S. These businesses are recognized for their contributions to the local communities and for fostering community vitality. The selection was announced in Palm Springs, California, on October 17, 2024. Among the businesses highlighted is Blackbook Bar & Kitchen, showcasing their commitment to bringing people together and enhancing their local community.

news.headline: Island Abbey Nutritionals introduces center-filled gummies, set to revolutionize VMS industry.
news.summary: In Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island on October 17, 2024, Island Abbey Nutritionals, a prominent company in the production of gummy and honey lozenges, has revealed the introduction of a cutting-edge product: center-filled gummies. This innovative addition to their manufacturing line is poised to revolutionize the market for vitamins, minerals, and supplements.

news.headline: IntelAgree, an AI-powered CLM platform, included in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for first time, showcasing growth.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on October 17, 2024, IntelAgree, a top AI-driven contract lifecycle management (CLM) platform, revealed its debut appearance in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Lifecycle Management. This acknowledgment signifies IntelAgree's excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 own shares, holding now at 300,000. Total voting rights stand at 900,000.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $292.5 mln.
Foxit to showcase PDF accessibility innovations at EDUCAUSE 2024 with enhanced Accessible Math capabilities.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, Foxit, a prominent provider of innovative PDF and eSignature solutions, is set to exhibit its advanced PDF accessibility features at EDUCAUSE 2024 in San Antonio, Texas. The company aims to assist knowledge workers in boosting productivity and maximizing document capabilities. Specifically, Foxit will showcase its upgraded Accessible Math features at the event. Leveraging the most current PDF 2.0 standards, these capabilities make intricate mathematical formulas accessible to individuals. This initiative underscores Foxit's commitment to enhancing document accessibility and empowering users.

news.headline: CareSource partners with Nomi Health to improve healthcare access for 2 million members in Ohio, Georgia, and Indiana.
news.summary: CareSource, a non-profit health plan serving more than 2 million members, has chosen to collaborate with Nomi Health to introduce a new initiative to address healthcare disparities for its Medicaid members in Ohio, Georgia, and Indiana. The partnership intends to strengthen access to crucial healthcare services and boost health outcomes for individuals encountering obstacles to care. Through this joint effort, the two organizations aim to make a significant impact in closing gaps in healthcare accessibility and quality for the benefit of members in these states.

news.headline: Wag Hotels in Sacramento to host 9th Annual Howl-o-ween party for dogs on Oct 24 from 6:30-8:00pm.
news.summary: Wag Hotels in Sacramento, California will be hosting their yearly Halloween celebration for dogs on Thursday, October 24th, from 6:30 to 8:00 pm.

news.headline: Asian World Film Festival marks 10th anniversary in LA, revealing event dates and programs. Los Angeles' top Asian film celebration.
news.summary: Los Angeles is set to host the prestigious Asian World Film Festival (AWFF) to mark its tenth anniversary, celebrating Asian filmmakers. Scheduled for Oct. 17, 2024, this renowned event is a significant showcase for the industry. The festival, a key highlight in Los Angeles, promises a gathering of cinematic talents and enthusiasts. The 10th edition is expected to draw a large audience as it features some of the most anticipated films in the Asian film scene. It's a testament to the growing popularity and recognition of Asian cinema globally.

news.headline: Founder of Little Saints, Megan Klein, to feature on Shark Tank Season 16 premiere with non-alcoholic cocktails and spirits powered by functional mushrooms. Premiering on October 18th at 8pm EST.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Megan Klein, the Miami entrepreneur behind Little Saints, a line of non-alcoholic beverages infused with functional mushrooms, is set to appear on the season premiere of the popular television show Shark Tank. The episode will air on October 18th at 8pm EST. Megan Klein’s company offers a unique alternative in the market, combining healthy ingredients with innovative flavors. Make sure to tune in to see if she can secure investment from the sharks.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee does not comment on monetary policy or the economic outlook in his welcoming remarks to a conference on careers in economics.
LoanPro introduces Smart Verify tool for identity verification & ongoing monitoring with third-party data integration.
news.summary: In a release made today, LoanPro, a contemporary lending and credit platform based in Salt Lake City, revealed the introduction of Smart Verify. This innovative suite of data solutions incorporates external data sources into their system to facilitate swift identity verification and continuous monitoring for both business and consumer accounts. With the current market instability and frequent changes in regulations, financial institutions and credit providers often resort to antiquated third-party data for crucial decision-making in account management.

news.headline: CData to host virtual Foundations Conference on Nov 20-21, 2024, focused on modern data connectivity strategies for business efficiency and AI success.
news.summary: CData Software ("CData"), a top data connectivity solutions provider, has revealed details about their inaugural company conference called Foundations. This event is set to occur online on November 20-21, 2024. Foundations aims to delve into the process of creating a contemporary data connectivity strategy that enhances business productivity while laying down a sturdy groundwork for successful AI ventures. This conference's content is centered around empowering companies to seamlessly integrate data for optimal performance and innovation.
